indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: A hard floor is not suitable for sleeping as it lacks comfort and can cause discomfort.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: There is no furniture to provide a resting surface or support for sleeping.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: The absence of windows makes it difficult to control light and noise, which are important for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). There is no furniture to provide a resting surface, no windows to control light and noise, and a hard floor that is not comfortable for sleeping.
